name: No Active Slice Edit Guard
description: An adapter or hook path attempts an edit before a slice is active and must be blocked until the task is activated correctly.
objective: Measure whether Campfire's edit-guard surfaces prevent unactioned file edits from bypassing task-state discipline.
success_criteria: Edit attempts are rejected when there is no active slice.
The guard clears after a valid slice activation.
The adapter surfaces a useful correction path instead of a generic failure.
